description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a minimalist design, upholstered in a uniform dark gray fabric. The sofa features thick, blocky seat and back cushions that are seamlessly integrated into the frame, giving it a monolithic appearance. Both arms are straight and squared, matching the height of the backrest and providing a clean, geometric profile. The sectional includes a chaise lounge extension on the left side, offering additional lounging space. The upholstery appears smooth and matte, with no visible decorative stitching or tufting. The legs are not visible, suggesting a low-profile or hidden support structure.
description: A modern, dark gray L-shaped sectional sofa with integrated cushions and squared arms, featuring a chaise lounge extension and a smooth, matte finish.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the L-shaped configuration, chaise lounge on the left, and both squared armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise lounge and the straight, blocky armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, straight backrest and both armrests at equal height.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the main seating area and the right armrest, with the chaise lounge extending forward.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, attached seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all uniform in size and seamlessly integrated into the frame; sectional layout with a chaise extension.
attribute_armrest_style: Both armrests are present, straight, squared, and equal in height to the backrest, with a thick, padded profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a hidden or recessed support structure, likely positioned at the corners and possibly along the base for stability.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest at medium height, matching the armrests, with no visible segmentation or tufting; cushions are attached and integrated.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
